transcript.clean_text: stage 12 of the tour de france would have had riders and directors worrying before the flag was waived cross winds forecast for certain sectors and history of wind affecting the race on the way to nim 159.4 kilometers in total possible sprints maybe a breakaway even a gc battle just about anything was possible on a wavy course two thousand meters of climbing peter sagan a non-starter unable to recover from a knee injury but it was his teammate nils pollock driving things at the front of the race and in the first 20 kilometers there were echelons no major names caught out but riders who'd started as pre-race favorites and had since become domestic to crashes and losing time were in groups three and four thomas and port and the rest getting back in however as the race soon settled down a group of 13 riders went up the road including grand tour and tour de france stage winners andre kripal was there and the world champion julian alaphilippe it soon become clear that they'd take today's stage win attack started very early over 40 kilometers to go stefan kung was involved harry sweeney as well pollock came across as diddy manola viti the likes of boston hagen ala philippe enau and company were left chasing uncategorized climb inside the last 15 kilometers started the party up front now over a minute of a gap on the rest of the 13-man break away four became three as kung was left and with just under 12 kilometers to go neal's polit made his move it'd have been a nightmare start of the day for borah with peter sagan unable to start but once the 27 year old german who's impressed in the classic since turning pro went ahead they were not getting him back imanol erviti and harry sweeney chasing polit about to see his life change forever even he couldn't believe it but he had the strength he had everything in the legs all the heart on show and it all came together to produce a wonderful win a race-saving win for his team borahan scorer his first year signing for the team and that signing paying off with a first ever tour de france stage win for him the experienced iman oler viti the spanish domestique for mavi star a one club man 17 years pro with the same team came second sweeney third on debut but it was polite at his fifth tour of france who took a brilliant stage win over half a minute his margin of victory kung mesgets and greipel in the top six with turns for moore ala philippe and they're now making up a top ten separated by two minutes behind mark cavettish showed he was still the sprint king picking up the crumbs in the green jersey competition the main peliton coming home almost 16 minutes after the stage winner no changes either in the yellow jersey competition are still leading the tour de france as the race now heads to carcassonne with five minutes and 18 seconds of an advantage on to the next stage then the wind once more will be forecast to blow will it be a sprint will it be a breakaway we don't know it will certainly be a long day 220 kilometers and the tour de france heading once again the carcassonne normally there's a rest day there but after this particular stage the race will enter the pyrenees pollen the winner on the day the expected winds blowing but not blowing enough tomorrow's another day though on the stage 13 with the tour de france all up in the air you
